data_description.entry_type: "address" for a single address, "xpub" for a hardware wallet (HD wallet)

address.title: Add Bitcoin Address
address.description: Enter a Bitcoin wallet address (Legacy, SegWit or Native SegWit).

xpub.title: Add HD Wallet (xpub)
xpub.description: Enter the Extended Public Key (xpub/ypub/zpub) of your hardware wallet. All addresses will be derived automatically (gap limit: 20).

error.invalid_address: Invalid Bitcoin address. Must start with 1, 3 or bc1.
error.invalid_xpub: Invalid Extended Public Key. Must start with xpub, ypub or zpub.

abort.already_configured: This wallet is already set up.
